items.title_en: Atlassian stock soars 20% after earnings show strong cloud, data center growth
items.title_zh: 财报显示云和数据中心强劲增长后 Atlassian 股价飙升 20%
items.desc_en: Atlassian's stock has been hit hard in the "SaaS-pocalypse" sweeping software names as AI threatens to disrupt their business models.
items.desc_zh: 由于人工智能有可能颠覆其商业模式，Atlassian 的股价在席卷软件界的“SaaS 末日”中遭受重创。

items.title_en: Roblox shares plummet 18% as child safety measures weigh on bookings
items.title_zh: 由于儿童安全措施影响预订量，Roblox 股价暴跌 18%
items.desc_en: Roblox is facing over 140 federal lawsuits accusing it of failing to prevent child exploitation, and last month settled with Alabama and West Virginia.
items.desc_zh: Roblox 面临 140 多起联邦诉讼，指控其未能防止儿童剥削，并于上个月与阿拉巴马州和西弗吉尼亚州达成和解。

items.title_en: Lutnick gets grilling on Nvidia chip sales to China in letter from Sen. Chris Coons
items.title_zh: 参议员克里斯·库恩斯 (Chris Coons) 致信，批评卢特尼克 (Lutnick) 就 Nvidia 向中国销售芯片一事进行质问
items.desc_en: Sen. Chris Coons demanded answers on H200 chips sales to China after Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick and the Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang give differing answers.
items.desc_zh: 在商务部长霍华德·卢特尼克和英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋给出不同答案后，参议员克里斯·库恩斯要求回答有关向中国销售 H200 芯片的问题。

items.title_en: Stocks closed April at records. But something's happening that could break the boom
items.title_zh: 四月份股市收盘创历史新高。但正在发生的事情可能会打破繁荣
items.desc_en: A rising 30-year U.S. Treasury bond yield could herald an end to the rally, according to a Bank of America strategist.
items.desc_zh: 美国银行策略师表示，30年期美国国债收益率上升可能预示着涨势结束。

items.title_en: Iran gives the U.S. new response on draft peace deal - Axios
items.title_zh: 伊朗就和平协议草案向美国作出新回应 - Axios
items.desc_en: Iran gives the U.S. new response on draft peace deal  AxiosLive Updates: Iran offers new proposal for talks with U.S. to end war as standoff's costs multiply  CBS NewsTrump Vows to Maintain Pressure o
items.desc_zh: 伊朗就和平协议草案向美国作出新回应 AxiosLive 更新：随着对峙成本成倍增加，伊朗提出与美国谈判结束战争的新建议 哥伦比亚广播公司 (CBS) 新闻特朗普誓言维持对伊朗的压力

items.title_en: A major shift could soon happen in the Mag 7
items.title_zh: Mag 7 很快就会发生重大转变
items.desc_en: Quietly, shares of Google-parent Alphabet are on the verge of topping $5 trillion, and overtaking AI-leader Nvidia as the world's most valuable company.
items.desc_zh: 悄然间，谷歌母公司 Alphabet 的股价即将突破 5 万亿美元，并超越人工智能领军企业英伟达，成为全球市值最高的公司。

items.title_en: Smoothie King plots expansion as wellness trends boost sales
items.title_zh: 随着健康趋势促进销售，Smoothie King 计划扩张
items.desc_en: Smoothie King's system-wide sales have climbed 64% over the last five years.
items.desc_zh: 过去五年来，Smoothie King 的全系统销售额增长了 64%。

items.title_en: Fed dissenters explain 'no' votes, saying they disagreed with hinting next move would be a cut
items.title_zh: 美联储持不同政见者解释了“反对”票，称他们不同意暗示下一步行动将是降息
items.desc_en: Federal Reserve officials who voted this week against the post-meeting statement said they didn't think it was appropriate to signal that the next interest rate move would be lower.
items.desc_zh: 本周对会后声明投反对票的美联储官员表示，他们认为暗示下一步利率将降低是不合适的。

items.title_en: Pentagon tech chief says Anthropic is still blacklisted, but Mythos is a separate issue
items.title_zh: 五角大楼技术负责人表示，Anthropic 仍被列入黑名单，但 Mythos 是一个单独的问题

items.title_en: Elon Musk billionaires bill supporters draw progressive challengers in Delaware
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克亿万富翁法案的支持者在特拉华州吸引了进步的挑战者
items.desc_en: Musk, whose record pay package was in legal limbo in Delaware, relocated Tesla's incorporation out of state during the spat.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克的创纪录薪酬在特拉华州陷入法律困境，在这场争执期间，他将特斯拉的公司迁出了该州。

items.title_en: Antigua and Barbuda prime minister set to win fourth term in election - The Guardian
items.title_zh: 安提瓜和巴布达总理将在选举中赢得第四个任期 - 《卫报》
items.desc_en: Antigua and Barbuda prime minister set to win fourth term in election  The GuardianAntigua and Barbuda PM Browne wins fourth term promising growth  ReutersAntigua and Barbuda PM Gaston Browne wins fou
items.desc_zh: 安提瓜和巴布达总理将在选举中赢得第四个任期《卫报》安提瓜和巴布达总理布朗赢得第四个任期，有望实现经济增长路透社安提瓜和巴布达总理加斯顿·布朗赢得第四个任期

items.title_en: Spotify adds 'Verified' badges to distinguish human artists from AI
items.title_zh: Spotify 添加“已验证”徽章以区分人类艺术家和人工智能
items.desc_en: The music streaming platform will review criteria such as artists' live dates and social media presence.
items.desc_zh: 该音乐流媒体平台将审查艺术家的现场日期和社交媒体存在等标准。

items.title_en: Berkshire shares struggle into annual meeting. Can Abel rekindle enthusiasm without Buffett center stage?
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔股票在年会上陷入困境。如果没有巴菲特的关注，阿贝尔能否重燃热情？
items.desc_en: For the first time, the 95-year-old Buffett won't be the central figure on stage, marking a new era for one of investing's most closely watched rituals.
items.desc_zh: 95 岁的巴菲特将首次不再成为舞台上的中心人物，这标志着最受关注的投资仪式之一进入了新时代。

items.title_en: Inside the Fed: Powell vows he won't be a 'shadow chair,' but a Warsh clash will be tough to avoid
items.title_zh: 美联储内部：鲍威尔发誓他不会成为“影子主席”，但沃什的冲突将难以避免
items.desc_en: When the Fed gathers again, it will mark the first time a sitting and former chair conduct business together in nearly 80 years.
items.desc_zh: 当美联储再次召开会议时，这将标志着近 80 年来首次现任主席和前任主席一起处理事务。

items.title_zh: 赫格斯称时钟在寻求批准伊朗战争的最后期限前暂停
items.desc_en: The US defence secretary says the timer for the president to report to Congress "pauses or stops" in a ceasefire.
items.desc_zh: 美国国防部长表示，在停火协议中，总统向国会报告的时间“暂停或停止”。

items.title_zh: 以色列拦截加沙援助船队后释放希腊境内除两名活动人士外的所有活动人士

items.desc_zh: 这位前领导人尚未回应美国关于他旨在破坏政府稳定的指控。

items.title_en: Vonn still in 'survival mode' after Olympic crash
items.title_zh: 奥运事故后沃恩仍处于“生存模式”
items.desc_en: American skiing great Lindsey Vonn says she is still "too emotional" to make a decision on her future career as she faces at least 18 months of recuperation.
items.desc_zh: 美国滑雪名将林赛·沃恩 (Lindsey Vonn) 表示，她仍然“过于情绪化”，无法对未来的职业生涯做出决定，因为她面临至少 18 个月的康复期。

items.desc_zh: 此举预计将为苏格兰经济每月带来数百万美元的收入。

items.title_en: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
items.title_zh: 化肥老板表示，伊朗战争导致数十亿粮食面临风险
items.desc_en: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.
items.desc_zh: 雅拉公司的老板表示，伊朗冲突造成的化肥短缺可能会降低农作物产量并推高价格。

items.title_zh: 共和党人表示，尽管最后期限已到，但他们将在伊朗战争问题上听从特朗普的意见 - NPR

items.desc_zh: 共和党人表示，尽管最后期限已到，他们仍将在伊朗战争问题上听从特朗普的意见，因白宫称伊朗停火终止了 60 天战争最后期限，NPROil 上涨。 CNBC 共和党人表示，他们将听从特朗普的意见

items.title_en: Six injured in Washington state school stabbing
items.title_zh: 华盛顿州立学校发生持刀伤人事件 六人受伤
items.desc_en: Five students and one security guard were taken to hospital following the attack at Foss High School.
items.desc_zh: 福斯高中发生袭击事件后，五名学生和一名保安被送往医院。

items.title_en: Apple CEO Tim Cook warns of extended memory crunch. 'We'll look at a range of options'
items.title_zh: 苹果公司首席执行官蒂姆·库克警告说，内存紧张可能会持续存在。 “我们将考虑一系列选择”
items.desc_en: In Apple's quarterly earnings report, CEO Tim Cook warned of further memory constraints in the coming quarters.
items.desc_zh: 在苹果公司的季度收益报告中，首席执行官蒂姆·库克警告称，未来几个季度内存将进一步受到限制。

items.title_en: Brazil's Congress approves plan to drastically cut Bolsonaro's jail term
items.title_zh: 巴西国会批准大幅缩短博尔索纳罗刑期的计划
items.desc_en: Last year ex-president Jair Bolsonaro was sentenced to 27 years in jail for plotting a coup after losing an election.
items.desc_zh: 去年，前总统雅伊尔·博尔索纳罗因在选举失败后策划政变而被判处 27 年监禁。

items.desc_zh: Lindsay 和 Craig Foreman 去年在伊朗骑摩托车旅行时被捕，目前面临 10 年监禁的现实。

items.title_en: Apple hails 'extraordinary' iPhone demand as boss Tim Cook heads out
items.title_zh: 苹果公司老板蒂姆·库克离职后称赞 iPhone 需求“非凡”
items.desc_en: Cook is preparing to bow out after 15 years at the helm and hand over to John Ternus.
items.desc_zh: 库克准备在执掌公司 15 年后辞职，将权力移交给约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus)。

items.title_en: Iranian supreme leader says only place Americans belong in the Gulf is 'at the bottom of its waters' - Fortune
items.title_zh: 伊朗最高领导人表示，海湾地区唯一属于美国人的地方是“海湾水域的底部” - 财富
items.desc_en: Iranian supreme leader says only place Americans belong in the Gulf is 'at the bottom of its waters'  FortuneIran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei says new management of Strait of Hormuz 'will bring
items.desc_zh: 伊朗最高领导人表示，海湾地区唯一属于美国人的地方是“其水域的底部”

items.title_en: Friday, May 1, 2026: Jim Cramer discusses his next moves for the Investing Club
items.title_zh: 2026 年 5 月 1 日星期五：吉姆·克莱默 (Jim Cramer) 讨论他对投资俱乐部的下一步行动

items.title_en: Britney Spears charged in California with driving under influence
items.title_zh: 布兰妮·斯皮尔斯在加州被指控酒后驾车
items.desc_en: The pop star's representatives have called the incident "completely inexcusable" and she has since checked herself into rehab.
items.desc_zh: 这位流行歌星的代表称这一事件“完全不可原谅”，此后她已经接受了康复治疗。

items.title_en: Twitch streamer hit by car live on camera - 'It felt like slow motion'
items.title_zh: Twitch 主播被车撞到镜头前直播 - “感觉就像慢动作”
items.desc_en: Isaiah Thomas, known as hmblzayy, was walking a 3,000-mile challenge when he was hit
items.desc_zh: 以赛亚·托马斯（Isaiah Thomas，又名 hmblzayy）在进行 3,000 英里挑战时被击中

items.title_en: Myanmar ex-leader Aung San Suu Kyi moved to house arrest, military says
items.title_zh: 缅甸前领导人昂山素季转为软禁，军方称
items.desc_en: The Nobel Peace Prize laureate has been in detention since she was ousted in a military coup in 2021.
items.desc_zh: 这位诺贝尔和平奖获得者自 2021 年在军事政变中被赶下台以来一直被拘留。

items.desc_zh: 这家人工智能公司表示，与之前的模型错误不同，这个问题“悄然出现”。

items.desc_en: Elon Musk was cross-examined on the third day of the trial over his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI.

items.title_en: The friendlier the AI chatbot the more inaccurate it is, study suggests
items.title_zh: 研究表明，人工智能聊天机器人越友好，它就越不准确
items.desc_en: Researchers found adjusting AI systems to be more warm and friendly to users would result in an "accuracy trade-off".
items.desc_zh: 研究人员发现，将人工智能系统调整为对用户更加热情和友好会导致“准确性权衡”。

items.title_en: Musk says basis of charitable giving at stake in OpenAI lawsuit
items.title_zh: 马斯克表示 OpenAI 诉讼中慈善捐赠的基础受到威胁
items.desc_en: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.
items.desc_zh: 关于 OpenAI 的历史和公开承诺的案例可能会对人工智能的未来产生重大影响。

items.desc_zh: AI 聊天和 API 让您的对话完全私密

items.title_en: Social media restrictions for under-16s even if no ban, minister says
items.title_zh: 部长表示，即使没有禁令，对 16 岁以下青少年的社交媒体也有限制
items.desc_en: The government is consulting on changes as a new social media law goes through its final Parliamentary stages.
items.desc_zh: 随着新的社交媒体法进入议会最后阶段，政府正在就修改进行咨询。

items.title_en: Musk v Altman: Why the tech billionaires and former friends are now facing off in court
items.title_zh: 马斯克诉奥特曼：为什么科技亿万富翁和前朋友现在在法庭上对峙
items.desc_en: The battle between the AI big hitters has largely played out on social media. Now it is coming to the courtroom.
items.desc_zh: 人工智能巨头之间的战斗主要在社交媒体上展开。现在它来到了法庭。

items.desc_zh: 该垫将与 PC、Valve 的手持控制台、Steam Deck 以及即将推出的游戏 PC 兼容。
